title: Ginger Ray Christmas Naughty Novelty Caution Tape - 6 Metre - Novelty Christmas
features: Drape across walls, doors and across furniture to bring attention to what those naughty elves have been up to
Perfect for the build up for your family Christmas
Part of the Ginger Ray 'Novelty Christmas' range
description: Product Description Decorate your home this Christmas with this fun caution tape perfect for little ones who are being kept an eye on in the lead up to Christmas. Give the whole family a fun experience by decorating the Mischievous Elves Alert" caution tape across walls doors and furnitureEach pack contains 1 caution tape that measures at 6 m long." Safety Warning No Warning
